title: Add five new selectable passes to homepage Tickets & Passes section

requirements.text: Update the homepage "Tickets & Passes" UI (in `frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLocationSection.tsx`) to include five additional pass options with the exact names, price/inclusion text, and descriptions specified in the conversation: (1) Content Creator Pass ($4) with a creator/influencer-focused description; (2) Touch Pass (Included with Regular Pass; ask to upgrade) with a description about interactive/touch-allowed elements; (3) Skip the Line Pass ($34) with a description about priority entry; (4) Blackout Pass (Included with ticket) with a description warning guests who are afraid of the dark; (5) Kid Pass ($8) with a description for younger guests/family-friendly access. Keep existing passes already shown unless explicitly removed by the user.

quotes: Add 5 new passes the content creator pass, the Touch pass, the Skip the line pass $34, the Blackout pass and the kid pass $8
Passes appear on homepage... Include price and name descriptions... Passes are meant to selectable to secure ur pass
Content creator pass is $4, Touch pass is included with regular pass just ask to upgrade and blackout pass is included with ticket but be warned if u are afraid of dark

acceptanceCriteria: On the homepage, the Tickets & Passes card lists the five new passes in addition to the existing passes.
Each of the five new passes displays: (a) pass name, (b) price or inclusion label exactly as provided, and (c) the provided/generated description text.
Skip the Line Pass shows $34 and Kid Pass shows $8.
Touch Pass displays that it is included with Regular Pass and requires asking to upgrade.
Blackout Pass displays that it is included with ticket and includes a clear darkness-related warning.

requirements.text: Make the pass options selectable on the homepage Tickets & Passes section, and provide a clear call-to-action to "secure" the selected pass (UI-only). Selection should be obvious and accessible (keyboard navigable), and the CTA must not require implementing payments.

quotes: Passes are meant to selectable to secure ur pass

acceptanceCriteria: Users can select exactly one pass option in the Tickets & Passes section (e.g., radio-group style selection).
A "Secure your pass" call-to-action is present and is disabled until a pass is selected.
Triggering the CTA provides immediate UI feedback that includes the selected pass name (e.g., a toast/alert/inline confirmation).
No payment processing, checkout flow, or third-party integrations are added.

constraints: Do not modify any files under `frontend/src/components/ui` (read-only UI components must be composed, not edited).
Do not edit immutable frontend hook entrypoints: `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts`, `frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx`, `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts`, `frontend/src/main.tsx`.
Keep backend as a single Motoko actor; do not introduce additional backend services.
nonGoals: Implementing real payment processing or checkout for passes.
Adding third-party authentication (anything other than Internet Identity).
Persisting pass selections to backend storage unless explicitly requested later.
